queries.question: What currency exchange services are near gate 10 and what ATM machines are at the same location?
queries.sql:
SELECT Currency_Exchange_Service.name
FROM Currency_Exchange_Service
WHERE Currency_Exchange_Service.Location_Within_Terminal = "Near Gate 10"
UNION
SELECT ATM_Machine.name
FROM ATM_Machine
WHERE ATM_Machine.Location_Within_Terminal = "Near Gate 10"

queries.question: Show currency exchange services and ATM machines near gate 10.
queries.sql:
SELECT Currency_Exchange_Service.name
FROM Currency_Exchange_Service
UNION
SELECT ATM_Machine.name
FROM ATM_Machine
WHERE ATM_Machine.Location_Within_Terminal = "Near Gate 10"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show currency exchange services and ATM machines near gate 10.
